name: Books | Ernesto Cisneros Cino
description: Books by Ernesto Cisneros Cino: Sombras, Datos y Relámpagos; La Sospecha Razonable; and the upcoming Huella. Available on Amazon.

name: Sombras, Datos y Relámpagos
description: A hybrid work structured in three movements — stories exploring power (Sombras), philosophical essays on data and truth (Datos), and poems that illuminate like lightning (Relámpagos). A journey from shadow to clarity.

isPartOf.name: The Power Trilogy
isPartOf.description: A trilogy exploring power, memory, knowledge, and the unknown through fiction, essay, and poetry.

name: La Sospecha Razonable
alternateName: Reasonable Suspicion: Speculative Tales of Power, Memory, and the Unknown
description: Twelve speculative tales where science, philosophy, and fiction intersect. Book II of the Power Trilogy — stories that question the boundaries between what we know and what we suspect.

isPartOf.name: The Power Trilogy
isPartOf.description: A trilogy exploring power, memory, knowledge, and the unknown through fiction, essay, and poetry.

name: Huella
description: A journey through the history of human knowledge, from the first marks on stone to the frontiers of modern science. Forthcoming.

isPartOf.name: The Power Trilogy
isPartOf.description: A trilogy exploring power, memory, knowledge, and the unknown through fiction, essay, and poetry.
